summary: Validated install/build pipeline fix end-to-end. package.json and package-lock.json are synchronized on lucide-react-native@1.25.0, npm ci succeeds from lockfile, npm ls resolves exact version, npm run build:web succeeds and exports dist, and vercel/workflow are aligned to clean npm ci pipeline.
action_items: No blocking action items from this testing scope.
Optional: run same pipeline on Node 22 runtime to remove local EBADENGINE warnings in non-Vercel environments.
critical_code_review_comments: No critical code review issues identified in tested pipeline files.
Node 22 remains required by package engines; local Node 20 emits EBADENGINE warnings but does not block npm ci/build in this environment.
context_for_next_testing_agent: This run focused only on install/build artifacts and commands at repo root. Verified npm ci, npm ls lucide-react-native --depth=0, npm run build:web, dist existence, vercel.json, and GitHub workflow install-and-build.yml.
rca of the issue: Original failure RCA was lockfile drift: package.json required lucide-react-native@1.25.0 while package-lock.json had older 0.468.0 and release configs had legacy fallback behavior. Current state is corrected: lockfile and configs are synchronized with clean npm ci pipeline and successful web export.
test_credentials: Not required for this scope (no auth/API flow tested).
